# Sample Documentation

## Overview

This is a sample markdown document for testing clipper's documentation processing capabilities. It contains various markdown elements and formatting.

## Features

- **Bold text** and *italic text*
- `inline code` snippets
- Code blocks:

```python
def hello_world():
    print("Hello, World!")
    return True
```

- Lists:
  - Item 1
  - Item 2
    - Nested item 2.1
    - Nested item 2.2
  - Item 3

## Tables

| Feature | Status | Notes |
|---------|--------|-------|
| Basic parsing | ✅ Complete | Handles standard markdown |
| Tables | ✅ Complete | Full table support |
| Code blocks | ✅ Complete | Syntax highlighting ready |
| Lists | ✅ Complete | Nested lists supported |

## Links and References

For more information, see the [official documentation](https://example.com/docs).
